questions.question: In order to do round trip in the field do you require following the ADNOC ONSHORE Journey Management system (Booking Out/In procedure)?
Before your round trip in the field, are you required to check your vehicle?
The tyre pressure on hardtop is same as in the desert.
When changing a wheel, the handbrake should be applied.
Using mobile phone while driving can be hazardous.
When traveling in the desert and remote areas, a desert safety box is a must.
The minimum tyre tread depth is 2.4mm
According to ADNOC ONSHORE policy, can you use any type/brand of tyres for the vehicle being used in ADNOC ONSHORE fields.
If you find someone stuck in soft sand, stop in safe place and make a plan for it.
While driving in fog use the hazard lights in your vehicle and drive slowly.
A safety belt is only necessary while driving on high way.
Is it safe to wear the shoulder strap without the lap belt?
You don't need to fasten a safety belt if your vehicle has an air bag.
If you involve in a traffic incident do you need to complete an accident report?
Is it safer to drive a vehicle continuously up to 3 hours without having a rest / break?
Some drugs can affect your judgment and ability while driving.
Is it dangerous to drive a vehicle if you are extremely tired?
Vehicle should be parked off the road always.
If passenger refuses to wear a seat belt the driver can refuse to transport
A driver who reaches 12 violation points within 1 year will be subjected to disciplinary action.
